reasoning: Valaki megvert valakit = Someone beat someone
Kit vert meg valaki? = Who got beaten by someone? (Who did someone beat?)
Senki nem verte meg a Petyát = No one beat Peter
Valakit senki nem vert meg = Someone (accusative) no one beat = There is someone who didn't get beaten
Senki nem vert meg mindenkit = No one beat everyone
Senkit nem vert meg a Petya = Peter beat no one
Ki nem vert meg senkit? = Who didn't beat anyone?
Valaki senkit nem vert meg = Someone didn't beat anyone (statement form) = There's someone who didn't beat anyone
Mindenki megvert valakit = Everyone beat someone
Valaki megverte a Marcit = Someone beat Martin
Senkit nem vert meg senki = No one beat anyone / No one got beaten
Kit nem vert meg senki? = Who wasn't beaten by anyone?
Nem vertem meg senkit = I didn't beat anyone
